title: Communauté de communes du Montois
summary: The Communauté de communes du Montois is a former federation of municipalities (communauté de communes) in the Seine-et-Marne département and in the Île-de-France région of France. It was created in December 1998. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes de la Bassée - Montois in January 2014.
text:
The Communauté de communes du Montois is a former federation of municipalities (communauté de communes) in the Seine-et-Marne département and in the Île-de-France région of France. It was created in December 1998. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes de la Bassée - Montois in January 2014.

Composition
The Communauté de communes comprised the following communes:
